name: Complete RPMI-1640 (10% FBS)

notes.en: Suitable for suspension cells, lymphocytes, hybridomas. β-ME is important for lymphocyte culture (antioxidant). HEPES maintains pH stability during bench work outside CO₂ incubator.
notes.zh: 适用于悬浮细胞、淋巴细胞、杂交瘤。β-ME 对淋巴细胞培养很重要（抗氧化）。HEPES 维持 pH 稳定（CO₂ 培养箱外操作时）。

ref: Moore et al. (1967) JAMA 199:519; Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells

usage.en: RPMI-1640 complete medium (10% FBS) for lymphocyte and hematopoietic cell culture.
usage.zh: 含 10% FBS 的 RPMI-1640 完全培养基，用于淋巴细胞和造血细胞培养。

prepSteps.step: To 500 mL RPMI 1640 base medium, add 50 mL heat-inactivated FBS (10% final).
Add 5 mL L-glutamine (2 mM final) or use GlutaMAX-supplemented RPMI.
Optional: add 5 mL HEPES (10 mM final), 5 mL sodium pyruvate (1 mM), 0.5 mL β-mercaptoethanol (50 µM) for lymphocytes.
Mix gently and store at 4°C for up to 1 month.
